summary: Lead accepts RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 for PR integration after the systems R2 handoff and independent QA R4 ACCEPT. Canonical state is R0, the accepted roadmap is authoritative for forward maturity, M7 renderer work is retained as non-active PARTIAL evidence, and downstream R0 work remains gated on main integration and closure.

tests_run.result: RR0 roadmap adoption is ACCEPTED; four downstream RR0 tasks remain DRAFT; M7 strategic terrain renderer remains PARTIAL.
RR0-REPOSITORY-STATE-RECONCILIATION-001 is dependency-satisfied but remains DRAFT and is not started before adoption closure.

tests_run.command: validate-handoff.mjs for systems R2 and QA R4 handoffs
pnpm exec prettier --check docs/11-roadmap.md docs/23-milestone-acceptance-matrix.md docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md project/tasks/active/RR0-*.json
tests_run.result: All matched files use Prettier code style.

tests_run.command: node -e parse changed JSON, allowed/forbidden path assertion, and canonical ACCEPTED-state assertion

decisions.decision: Advance RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 from REVIEW to ACCEPTED and open the integration PR.
Do not start RR0-REPOSITORY-STATE-RECONCILIATION-001 until the adoption PR is merged and the adoption task is CLOSED.
Close the independent QA reviewer after ACCEPT and retain all failed/stalled reviewer history in repository evidence.

risks.summary: The original M7 renderer worktree still contains preserved partial work and must be reconciled by the next RR0 task without discarding user or worker changes.

requested_action: Commit acceptance evidence, push the branch, open the PR, wait for required CI, merge to main, then close the task.
